client_token.description: A unique token to ensure idempotency of the request.

cluster.description: The name of the ECS cluster where the service will be run.

desired_count.description: The number of instances of the task definition to place and keep running.

enable_ecs_managed_tags.description: Specifies whether to enable Amazon ECS managed tags for the tasks within the service.

enable_execute_command.description: Specifies whether to enable the execute command functionality on the tasks in the service.

group.description: The name of the task group associated with the service.

launch_type.description: The launch type on which to run your service, such as EC2 or FARGATE.

platform_version.description: The platform version on which to run your service. Only applicable for Fargate launch type.

propagate_tags.description: Specifies whether to propagate the tags from the task definition or the service to the tasks.

reference_id.description: An optional identifier that you can assign to the service.

started_by.description: An identifier for the entity that started the task.

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the resource.

task_definition.description: The family and revision (family:revision) or full ARN of the task definition to run in the service.
